# The Parlour

> The World's Most Exclusive Society of Magic — Based in San Diego, California.

The Parlour is an invitation-only collective where the ancient art of conjury is practiced, preserved, and perfected behind closed doors. We do not advertise. We do not recruit. Those who belong, know.

## About

The Parlour is an elite private magic club dedicated to master magicians in San Diego, California. Members demonstrate mastery of sleight of hand, close-up magic, stage illusion, and the performing arts of conjury. The Society preserves the traditions of magic while pushing the boundaries of the art form.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.parloursociety.org/): The Parlour — Where the Impossible Becomes Art
- [The Society](https://www.parloursociety.org/the-society): About The Parlour — its history, mission, and what makes it unlike any other magic organization
- [Membership](https://www.parloursociety.org/membership): How membership works — an invitation-only, merit-based process
- [Gatherings](https://www.parloursociety.org/gatherings): Private gatherings and sacred convocations of The Society
- [The Council](https://www.parloursociety.org/the-council): The distinguished leaders who guide The Parlour
- [Hall of Masters](https://www.parloursociety.org/hall-of-masters): Honoring those who have elevated the art to its highest form
- [Patronage](https://www.parloursociety.org/patronage): Support The Parlour through financial patronage or expertise
- [The Collection](https://www.parloursociety.org/resources): The world's most comprehensive curated library of magic resources

## Contact

Membership is by invitation only. To request consideration, visit [https://www.parloursociety.org/membership](https://www.parloursociety.org/membership).

## Location

San Diego, California, United States
